name: Alliance Coopératives Cameroun (COOP-CAMEROON)
description: COOP-CAMEROUN is the national association for the promotion and development of cooperatives in Cameroon.

name: Confédération Syndicale des Travailleurs du Cameroun
Confédération des Syndicats Autonomes du Cameroun
North West Cooperative Association Ltd (NWCA LTD)
description: NWCA is an apex of a three-tiered cooperative network with 35,000 small holder peasant farmers. The farmers are grouped into 43 cooperative produce marketing soceities at the base and 13 secondary cooperative unions spread throughout 34 subdivisions of the North West region of Cameroon. NWCA’s objective is production, processing and marketing of members produce mainly coffee. They are involved in the coffee value chain from farm to shelf. NWCA has exported green coffee for over 30 years. They play an active role in the socioeconomic development of their members through social, economic, and infrastructure development. They are one of the biggest production, processing and marketing cooperative networks in Cameroon.

name: Union des Mutuelles Financieres de Developpement (MUFID UNION)
description: MUFID UNION represents MUFID’s, which are financial mutuals for development that are registered as cooperative societies. MUFID UNION is registered as a microfinance institution and apex of the MUFID Network. They help MUFID’s develop, ensure that MUFID’s follow the standards, and are also the accountants for the MUFID’s.
